mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce discount rates for equity valuations, directly increasing present values of future corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or forward returns during rate cuts are statistically indistinguishable from baseline periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment rates signal deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, which reduces corporate revenue expectations and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 65% of instances when unemployment exceeds 4.5%, or the signal loses predictive power in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real estate sales volumes indicate robust household demand and financial stability, which supports consumer discretionary spending and generates positive equity market returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The correlation between RSAFS levels and 60-day forward returns falls below 0.05, or the signal fails to predict direction in over 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing output and improving supply chain efficiency, which boosts corporate profit margins and drives positive short-term S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in more than 60% of periods following industrial production acceleration, or the signal shows no statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated consumer price indices trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, which increases borrowing costs and compresses equity valuations, resulting in negative forward market returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in over 70% of high-inflation observations, or the inflation threshold fails to separate winning and losing periods in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total employment and stable unemployment rates indicate a healthy labor market expansion that supports wage growth and consumer spending, generating positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal loses predictive accuracy when either series moves independently, or Rank IC drops below 0.03 across all rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: High housing starts combined with strong real estate sales volumes signal a synchronized housing boom that amplifies household wealth effects and drives positive equity market performance over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the interaction effect vanishes when controlling for monetary policy shifts.

mechanism_narrative: Stagnant or contracting real GDP growth reflects a broad economic slowdown that reduces corporate earnings potential and triggers risk-off sentiment, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Equity markets generate positive 60-day returns in over 65% of low-GDP-growth periods, or the signal fails to predict downturns in walk-forward validation.
